workflows.description: The get-entity-workflows response `workflows` array. Each workflow renders as a collapsible titled group; its `groups` render as labelled sections of status-colored action buttons.

workflow_type.description: Stable workflow slug (e.g. 'onboarding'). Used as the collapse key by defaultActiveKeys/activeKeys and reported by onChange.

title.description: Workflow title shown on the collapsible row.

icon.description: Optional Antd/Lucide icon name shown on the workflow row. Omitted when absent (no icon slot).

groups.description: Action groups within the workflow, ordered by `order`. Each is a labelled section.

title.description: Section label. Omit to render an unlabelled section.

icon.description: Optional Antd/Lucide icon name shown left of the section title. Omitted when absent.

actions.description: Actions in the group, rendered as status-colored buttons.

status.description: Per-action status. Drives the button's fill/border/text color.

message.description: Button label. Sanitized HTML supported. Struck through when status is 'not-required'. For neat buttons, author this as a short action title (see the workflows `status_map` authoring note).

link.description: Server-resolved navigation target. Omit or set disabled to render a non-clickable button (e.g. a blocked action).

actionStatusConfig.description: Map of action status key → display config from the shared `action_statuses` enum. `color` is the button fill, `borderColor` the border, `titleColor` the text, `title` the tooltip label. Pass `_ref: components/action_statuses.yaml`.

workflowOverviewPageId.description: When set, each workflow row shows a 'Workflow Overview' icon-button linking to this pageId with `urlQuery: { workflow_id: workflow._id }`. Omit to hide the button.

disableTooltip.description: When true, action buttons render without their hover tooltip (verb label / status name / blocked hint).

activeActionId.description: The _id of the action currently being viewed. When it matches an action's _id, that button renders with a 'current' highlight. Omit on entity-view pages (no current action).

defaultActiveKeys.description: workflow_type slugs (e.g. 'onboarding') expanded on mount. When omitted, workflows with any non-terminal action start open. Overrides the terminal heuristic when set. Ignored when `activeKeys` is set.

activeKeys.description: Controlled expansion: the workflow_type slugs that are open. When set, drives expansion directly and takes precedence over `defaultActiveKeys` and user toggles — pair with the onChange event to update it.
